title: biauricula intermedia
intro: Biauricula intermedia, also known as intermediate auricula, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the primrose family and is native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The medicinal properties of Biauricula intermedia include its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. The herbal preparations of Biauricula intermedia typically involve infusions, decoctions, or tinctures made from its roots, leaves, or flowers, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
